title: ACEF Record Envelope
description: JSON Schema for individual evidence records stored in JSONL files within records/. Each line in a JSONL file is one record conforming to this schema. The payload field is validated separately by the corresponding record-type schema.

record_type.description: Semantic type from ACEF conventions (e.g., 'risk_register', 'dataset_card', 'event_log'). Must match a known record type or use x-vendorname/ prefix for extensions.

provisions_addressed.description: Which regulatory provisions this evidence supports (dotted notation: 'article-9.1.a', 'govern-1.1').

timestamp.description: When this evidence was created or collected (ISO 8601).

lifecycle_phase.description: Which lifecycle phase this evidence relates to.

collector.description: Tool or person that collected this evidence.

name.description: Name of the collection tool or person.

obligation_role.description: Who is responsible for producing this evidence. Required for transparency_marking, disclosure_labeling, and event_log records per EU AI Act and CAC split obligations.

redaction_method.description: If confidentiality is not 'public', describes the redaction approach: hash algorithm, ZKP reference, or attestation method.

access_policy.description: Who can see the full payload. Null if public.

roles.description: Roles that may access this record.

organizations.description: Organizations that may access this record.

entity_refs.description: Links to entities this record concerns.

subject_refs.description: URNs of subjects this record relates to.

component_refs.description: URNs of components this record relates to.

dataset_refs.description: URNs of datasets this record relates to.

actor_refs.description: URNs of actors this record relates to.

payload.description: The actual evidence data. Schema varies by record_type — validated separately by the corresponding record-type schema in acef-conventions/v{major}/{record_type}.schema.json.

attachments.description: References to files in the artifacts/ directory of the bundle.

path.description: Relative path within the bundle (e.g., 'artifacts/eval-report-v3.pdf'). Must use forward slashes, UTF-8 NFC, no . or .. segments.

hash.description: SHA-256 hash (advisory — content-hashes.json is authoritative for integrity; this field is for quick client-side checks).

attachment_type.description: Logical kind (e.g., 'management_review', 'post_market_monitoring_plan', 'qms_policy'). Used by DSL attachment_kind_exists operator.

attestation.description: Optional cryptographic attestation of evidence authenticity.

method.description: Attestation method. v1 restricts to 'jws' only.

signed_fields.description: JSON Pointer array of fields included in signature scope. MUST include '/payload'.

signature.description: Detached JWS over RFC 8785-canonicalized JSON of the signed fields extracted from the record.

retention.description: Per-record retention requirements. May differ from package-level retention.

min_retention_days.description: Minimum retention period in days (e.g., 180 for 6-month log retention).
